645 GG0130A2_EATG_GOAL_BY_END_CD GG0130A2_EATG_GOAL_BY_END_CD GG0130A2 Self Care: Eating Goal by End of SNF PPS Part A Stay CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's goal for self-feeding by the end of the SNF PPS Part A stay. -=Not assessed/no information
